title: Vanillish
description:
Vanilla-ish experience for minecraft survival mode, with some quality of life features such as world map, mini map, way stones and more included.

Works in single player and multiplayer
body:
**Vanillish** is a quality-of-life modpack for survival Minecraft, featuring a small selection of mods that enhance and expand upon the vanilla experience — especially in areas like world navigation and usability.

It works right out of the box for single-player worlds, but **for multiplayer, the modpack needs to be installed on both the server and the client.**
